    G

    getCheapestPrice(String, double) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.RecipeToolkit
    A function that takes the name of an ingredient needed and the minimum quantity needed and uses webscraping techniques to find the cheapest item with the required quantity and returns the price of that item
    getCloseTagLoc(String, String, StringLocation) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.WebScraper
    A private method that finds the close tag of the element
    getElement(String, String) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.WebScraper
    Gets the first element in `source` that has type `elementType`.
    getElementByID(String, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.WebScraper
    Gets the element with the specified id.
    getElementByIDNoCloseTag(String, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.WebScraper
    Gets the element with the specified id.
    getElementStartByID(String, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.WebScraper
    Gets the location of the open triangle of the element with the specified id

    getMinimumPrice(ArrayList<PriceQuantity>) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.PriceQuantity
    Static function that takes an ArrayList of priceQuantities and uses the compareTo function to find the one with the minimum price.
    getParameterValue(String, String) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.WebScraper
    Gets the string value of a specified parameter in an element.
    getPositions(String, String) - Static method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.StringToolkit
    takes a large string and a string to find within it and returns an object that contains the first and last positions of the substring in the larger string.

    getQuantity() - Method in class com.sshgroup.ssh_fridge_contents_tracker.PriceQuantity
